query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 11 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (11, 8) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%confeitaria%' OR name LIKE '%Confeitaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%brigadeiro%' OR name LIKE '%Brigadeiro%'
    OR name LIKE '%cake%' OR name LIKE '%Cake%' OR name LIKE '%CAKE%'
    OR name LIKE '%patisserie%' OR name LIKE '%Patisserie%' OR name LIKE '%Pâtisserie%'
    OR name LIKE '%brownie%' OR name LIKE '%Brownie%'
    OR name LIKE '%cupcake%' OR name LIKE '%Cupcake%'
    OR name LIKE '%doceria%' OR name LIKE '%Doceria%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 11 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (11, 8) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%confeitaria%' OR name LIKE '%Confeitaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%brigadeiro%' OR name LIKE '%Brigadeiro%'
    OR name LIKE '%cake%' OR name LIKE '%Cake%' OR name LIKE '%CAKE%'
    OR name LIKE '%patisserie%' OR name LIKE '%Patisserie%' OR name LIKE '%Pâtisserie%'
    OR name LIKE '%brownie%' OR name LIKE '%Brownie%'
    OR name LIKE '%cupcake%' OR name LIKE '%Cupcake%'
    OR name LIKE '%doceria%' OR name LIKE '%Doceria%');
